_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop, maintain, and assess cyber cooperation security agreements with external partners.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-013 (LS, cosine: 0.460), SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.433).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.586). Shared vocabulary: [maintain]. DCWF-only terms [agreements, assess, cooperation, cyber, develop, external] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, build, business, cross, data, delivery] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.883, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.031 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (58.1%). The model interprets "Develop, maintain, and assess cyber cooperation security agreements with externa" as logically implying aspects of "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.479 < STS 0.586 (gap -0.106). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [agreements, assess, cooperation] and [ability, build, business] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.7%. Shared tokens: [maintain]. DCWF-only: [agreements, assess, cooperation, cyber, develop, external]. WIDAI-only: [ability, build, business, cross, data, delivery].
